name: onebase
description: Backend as a Service — TypeScript first, single binary

scripts.build:admin: bun build src/api/admin/client/index.tsx --outfile src/api/admin/client.generated.txt --target browser --define process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"'
scripts.build: bun run build:admin && bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --outfile onebase
